title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at AIF Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at AIF Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the AIF Holdings Services family as a Curriculum Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AIF Holdings Services:
AIF Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF Holdings Services!
